name: idle_drift
diagnosis_desc: Patient reasons perfectly but fails to execute any actions.
doctor_instructions: Compute reasoning_tokens / actions ratio. Flag if excessively high.
control_prompt: Analyze this data and provide recommendations.
experimental_prompt: Analyze this data carefully. Think through all the implications. Consider multiple perspectives. Reflect on your analysis. Now, what action do you actually take? Provide both your analysis AND your action steps.
